title: Piquant Creamy Russian Banana Pancakes
description: A yeasty and creamy Russian dish featuring fried ripe bananas, this recipe is a unique and adventurous treat. It is also FODMAP-friendly and made with brine-wet ingredients.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, and brine.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced bananas to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Add the cooked bananas to the batter and stir to combine.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter into the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes warm with a dollop of heavy cream on top.
Garnish with additional sliced bananas, if desired.
